# TradeAnchor

> TradeAnchor (https://mytradewiseoc.com) is a free-to-start AI-powered trading journal SaaS for forex, crypto, and stock traders.

## What TradeAnchor Does

TradeAnchor helps traders record trades, analyze performance, and improve discipline through AI-driven insights.

Core capabilities:
- Smart CSV/Excel import (MT4, MT5, crypto exchanges) with auto column mapping
- Trade dashboard: P&L, win rate, profit factor, ROI, drawdown, calendar heatmap
- AI Confidence scores: execution consistency, risk exposure, concentration risk, overtrading
- Quick & Deep AI reports with follow-up Q&A on your trading data
- Trading diary for emotions, setup notes, and lessons learned
- Community Plaza to browse and publish trading strategies and ideas
- Multi-currency display, subscription tiers (Free / Pro / Premium)

## Who It Is For

- Forex traders (EURUSD, XAUUSD, etc.)
- Crypto traders (spot and futures, BTC, ETH, altcoins)
- Stock and futures traders
- Day traders, swing traders, and systematic traders who want data-driven improvement

- Hero preview: https://mytradewiseoc.com/og-image.png

## Pricing (USD)

- Free: $0 — up to 500 trades, 5 AI reports/month, dashboard, import, diary, community
- Pro: $19/month — unlimited trades, 50 AI reports/month, AI follow-up
- Premium: $29/month — 100 AI reports/month, advanced features

## Legal

- Terms: https://mytradewiseoc.com/terms
- Privacy: https://mytradewiseoc.com/privacy
- AI reports are for education and self-improvement only, not financial advice.

## Contact

- Website: https://mytradewiseoc.com
- Support: Customer service bot inside the app (Settings → Customer Service)
